sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31973" key="e(khbole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκηβολ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n31973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be an archer,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:7:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
